1. Visit the club’s official website or use the Barça Tickets app, 2. Choose the match you want to attend, 3. Select the seating zone that fits your budget, 4. Present your digital ticket and a valid ID, 5. Enjoy the full experience including the Barça Museum and stadium views, 6. Explore special add-ons if available.

1. Register your media outlet with the club’s official accreditation system, 2. Complete the accreditation request form for the specific match, 3. Submit the request within the established time window, 4. Wait for the club to review the application, 5. Receive confirmation of approval, 6. Collect your media pass at the designated accreditation center on match day.

1. Determine the nature of your concern, 2. Visit the official FC Barcelona website, 3. Locate the “Contact” or “Customer Service” section, 4. Wait for acknowledgment and follow up if necessary.

1. Identify the type of initiative you want to be involved in, 2. Clearly define your objectives, 3. Identify the target audience, 4. Determine the resources or expertise your organization can contribute, 5. Understand how your project aligns with the club’s social mission.

1. Identify the logos, images, or branding elements you wish to use, 2. Define the intended purpose (commercial, educational, media, promotional), 3. Submit a request to FC Barcelona’s licensing or legal department, 4. Provide a detailed description of the materials, context, medium, duration, and distribution plans, 5. Await the club's review and possible request for additional information, 6. If approved, receive a formal license or written permission specifying the terms, 7. Adhere strictly to the terms to avoid infringement.
